metadata.title: Bruno Mesquita — Fullstack Developer
metadata.description: Fullstack JS/TS Developer with 6+ years of experience in Node.js, React, React Native and NestJS.

hero.subtitle: Building digital products with Node.js, React and React Native for 6+ years.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a developer who enjoys building complete products — from the database to the mobile screen. Over 6 years I've worked across the full stack: backend APIs, web frontends and mobile apps, mostly in the B2B SaaS space. I like when the code I ship actually solves a real problem for real people.
about.bio2: Most of my career was spent at Waac (Compare Planos de Saúde), where I built and maintained internal CRM tools used by 100+ people across sales, HR and finance, as well as lead-generation sites in the health insurance market. Since mid-2025 I've been building my own products independently.
about.bio3: I thrive working close to the product — understanding why something is built matters as much to me as how it's built. I'm at my best on small, high-trust teams where I can contribute across the stack.
about.entrepreneur_desc: Building and launching own products end-to-end — from idea to deployment. Open to CLT, PJ or freelance opportunities.
about.waac_desc: Led fullstack development of internal CRM systems used daily by 100+ people across sales, HR and finance at Waac (Compare Planos de Saúde). Built and maintained lead-generation websites for the health insurance sector. Worked on a team of 3 developers, delivering 5+ internal products over 5 years.

contact.subtitle: Available for CLT, PJ or freelance opportunities.
